title: Moar Concrete
description: Get Moar Concrete in Minecraft 1.21 - slabs, stairs, walls, fences & gates, bricks, panels and buttons.
body:
Stairs looking a bit bland? Bored of the same old slabs? Brighten your world up with Moar Concrete! Includes slabs, stairs, walls, fences & gates, bricks, panels and buttons in all 16 concrete colours.

The new Moar Concrete blocks are available in the crafting table and stonecutter.

**Installation**

Moar Concrete is a Fabric mod, which means it requires the Fabric Loader. Once you have installed Fabric Loader, you can simply place Moar Concrete into your mods folder like anything else.

**Usage**

Moar Concrete is plug & play - once installed it will be active. Moar Concrete blocks will be available in the crafting table (all blocks) and stonecutter (exc. fences, gates and buttons) in survival and creative, as well as in the creative coloured blocks menu.

Fences & fence gates use the same recipe format as the wood versions, but using iron bars in place of the sticks.
